scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,realtime -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @whiteboard/web" "npm run dev --workspace @whiteboard/realtime"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @whiteboard/shared && npm run build --workspace @whiteboard/db && npm run build --workspace @whiteboard/auth && npm run build --workspace @whiteboard/realtime && npm run build --workspace @whiteboard/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @whiteboard/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @whiteboard/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @whiteboard/auth && npm run typecheck --workspace @whiteboard/realtime && npm run typecheck --workspace @whiteboard/web
